title: Topology Modules Artifact
description: Per-module topology metrics produced by APS-V1-0001 Code Topology. Written to .topology/metrics/modules.json. Includes aggregate complexity and Martin package metrics (Ca/Ce/I/A/D).

schema_version.description: SemVer of this artifact format. Consumers MUST select the matching schema version.

modules.description: All modules discovered by topology analysis.

id.description: Stable unique module identifier (e.g. 'auth', 'crypto'). Used as entity key in fitness rules with scope='module'.

name.description: Simple module name, typically the final path segment.

path.description: File or directory path, relative to the analysis root.

languages.description: Languages represented in this module. Multiple values indicate polyglot modules.

total_cyclomatic.description: Sum of per-function McCabe cyclomatic complexity within this module.

avg_cyclomatic.description: Arithmetic mean of per-function cyclomatic complexity. Zero when function_count == 0.

total_cognitive.description: Sum of per-function SonarSource cognitive complexity.

lines_of_code.description: Physical lines of code in the module (all functions and top-level).

MartinMetrics.description: Martin's package-level dependency metrics (Martin 1994 / 2003). Ca and Ce are module-level counts; I, A, D are derived and bounded to [0,1].

ca.description: Afferent coupling: number of modules that depend on this module.

ce.description: Efferent coupling: number of modules this module depends on.

instability.description: I = Ce / (Ca + Ce). 0 = maximally stable, 1 = maximally unstable. Defaults to 0.5 when Ca+Ce=0.

abstractness.description: A = abstract_types / total_types. 0 = fully concrete, 1 = fully abstract. Defaults to 0 when total_types=0.

distance_from_main_sequence.description: D = |A + I - 1|. 0 = on the main sequence (balanced), 1 = zone of pain or zone of uselessness.
